ddls:
CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the developer is currently active (1 for active, 0 for inactive) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location ID of the developer */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the developer was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the developer's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the developer company */,
  "funding" TEXT /* Information about funding rounds and investors */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes and information about the developer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the developer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the game */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series or franchise the game belongs to */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_platforms" TEXT /* JSON array of platforms the game is available on */,
  "genres" TEXT /* JSON array of game genres */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "sales_figures" TEXT /* JSON object containing sales figures by region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the game's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is based */,
  "autonomous_area" TEXT /* Autonomous area where the location is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, publisher, investor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developer_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer involved */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change or event */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., merger, acquisition, status change) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the change or event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the developer's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_history_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developer_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer the note is about */,
  "note_title" TEXT /* Title of the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or updated the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_notes_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)
